Okay, so what I'm going to show you here and walk you through is going to be a lead and stats Google sheet, which is going to save you a ton of time and also make you a ton of money with the stats tracking. So this sheet, you're going to find in the lead gen section underneath the Google sheets, it's going to say get your leads and stats Google sheet, you'll click that button below and what that would do is we'll open up the sheet, it'll have you make a copy of it and then when you make a copy of it, you can save it whatever you want and then you can also move it to whatever folder you want in your Google drive. So when you pull up the sheets, you're going to see that there's three tabs to it. You're going to have your tracking tab and this is going to be where the incoming leads will auto populate into the tracking tabs that way you have it all here. And so with this, what will happen is the date, first name, last name, email, phone number, appointment, all that stuff will auto populate by itself, but what you will have to do and fill out yourself is going to be whether they showed, you click this drop down, whether they showed yes, canceled or no showed, you'll check the box, the sole check box if they were sold and then you'll put the amount here for how much that they were sold for. Then you have your notes column and you can use that for managing lead nurture notes or sales notes, whatever you need to put in there about the prospect. Then we have our stats sheet and this stats sheet is really cool because what's going to do is going to save you a ton of time with tracking your stats and make sure that you are actually tracking your stats pretty much automatically. And this is so important because this is where you can make actual logical decisions about your business, not emotional decisions. So for example, if you don't have a lot of people signing up, you might say, I have a leads problem, I need more leads, but when you actually look at your numbers, you might realize that you just have a low schedule percentage and you need to increase your schedule percentage or you might have a show problem or you could have a sales problem or a closed problem. And so this is or you could even have a funnel conversion problem. And so this is where the only way that you can see what your true problem is, what your true bottleneck is if you're actually looking at the numbers. So for this, we want to make it super easy for you to do so. And then every single week on your weekly coaching forms, you'll be inputting these numbers so that way we can look at them and help you fix some of your bottlenecks or see your bottlenecks. So the only two things that you'll have to enter here will be from Facebook and that will be your ad spend. So how much have you spent on the campaign and you can find that in the business manager and then your unique clicks, which is another stat that you can also find in your Facebook business manager. And so what this will tell us is it will tell us what your cost per lead is, your funnel conversion percentage, we'll get to your schedule percentage, your show percentage and your closed percentage of course. And then this is where we'll be able to see your return on investment as well. So your incoming lead sheet, this is the sheet that Zapier is going to go ahead and auto populate from ClickFunnels, which I will show you how to do next. And this is where we'll put this information in. So what we'll have to do first is you'll need to have your ClickFunnels open, your page, your landing page, and then you need Zapier open as well. Okay. And so what we're going to do here is you're going to go ahead and go to your ClickFunnels page first. We're going to do a test opt-in. Okay. So that way we have some test data here. Okay. So you can go do that. Also good way to check to make sure that your ClickFunnels page is working. Perfect. Once you do that, what you're going to do here is we're going to go to make a Zap. You can name it whatever you want. You might name it incoming six week lead. And your trigger is going to be ClickFunnels. You're going to do new contact activity, save and continue. You're going to go ahead and connect your ClickFunnels account. If it's already connected, then you'll just click on it. And then what you'll do here is you're going to go ahead and figure out which funnel you're going to use. So for us, we are doing the... Perfect. And then the funnel step you want to do would be your Squeeze page. We'll hit Continue. All right. Now this is we're going to test it. We'll make sure that it is the test information that we put in there, which it is. We'll hit Continue. And now we're going to go ahead and add a step. And that step that we're going to add here is going to be ClickFunnels. I'm not ClickFunnels. I'm sorry. It's going to be Google Sheets. What we're going to do here is we're going to do create a spreadsheet row. Hit Save and Continue. We're going to go ahead and connect your account, whichever account you have on here. So I need to connect mine. It will just have you log into your Google account. Save and Continue. All right. And then from here, you're going to go ahead and pick your Drive, my Google Drive. You're going to pick the spreadsheet that you're updating. So it will be whatever you just named it. So for me, it's the copy of Leads and Stats. Your worksheet that you're going to do is going to be the incoming Leads. All right. And the ones that we'll be updating will be the date. So you'll do the created at. Then we'll do first name. Last name. Email. And phone number. The appointment you cannot do right now, that will come from your Acuity. And I will show you how to do that next. You'll hit Continue. I'm going to go ahead and send test to Google Sheets. Awesome. So we'll come back to our Google Sheets, see if it sent the test and it did. We have our date. We have our first name. So turn it on. You can save it to whichever folder you want. So your steps should just be click follows and then Google create a spreadsheet row and you can hit make another zap. And here now your trigger is going to be Acuity. First you can name it. So your trigger here will be Acuity. What you're going to do here is going to do new appointment. So we have a continue. So I'm going to go to my Acuity to do that. So again, just make a test appointment for you. You're going to go ahead and make an appointment for it again. So again, just make a test one as well. Perfect. And then now what we'll do is we'll come back to there and we're going to go ahead and click get samples. It's going to pull in the test one that you just made. So there I am. So I'm going to click on that sample. I'm going to hit continue. And then what I am going to do here is go ahead and add a step. Our action step is going to be Google Sheets next. And what you're going to do here is the first thing we're going to do is we're going to actually hit click look up spreadsheet row. Because your lead should already be in the spreadsheet. You go ahead and use your Google Sheets that you're using. You'll click on your drive spreadsheet. And then you'll have your worksheet, which is going to be the incoming leads. Your look up column is going to be the email. And your look up value is going to be the step one email. Okay. And then what you're going to do is you're going to click create a Google Sheets if this does not yet exist. And in this what we would do here is we would hit date. This would be when the appointment was created. Date created. Then you're going to have first name matches that were first name last day matches up with last name email latches matches up with email phone number matches up of course with phone number. And then your appointment is going to match up with date of appointment. And you can do that. And then time of appointment. And then you'll hit continue. And so if it was not able to actually look up that spreadsheet row, then what it would have done is it would have created one. So you're going to do add another step. And this one is going to be Google Sheets again. And then you're going to hit update spreadsheet row. You hit save and continue. Go ahead and go through the same things again connect to Google Sheets. Take your drive. Take your spreadsheet. Pick the worksheet which is incoming lead still.
